receipt_date.text: วันที่การเงิน

root.sql:
select ( case tab.group_item when 'LON' then trim( loan_type_des ) when 'LCC' then 'ค่าปรับเงินกู้' else tab.item_type_name end ) as case_item_type_name,tab.* from ( SELECT sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name ,'TBK - Slip' as money_type_id ,'ชำระพิเศษโอนผ่านธนาคาร' as money_type_name
,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount ) as principal_amount ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount ) as interest_amount ,sum( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount ) as item_amount ,count( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as c_count
,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id as item_type_id , (CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type )) ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) as loan_type_des ,sc_fin_m_bank.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name FROM sc_com_m_receipt ,sc_com_m_receipt_item ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_com_m_branch ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user ,sc_fin_m_bank ,sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id and sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id and sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin = sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank and sc_fin_m_bank.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id
and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status = '0' and sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' /*WHERE*/ GROUP BY sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item ,(CASE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item WHEN 'LON' THEN FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type )) ELSE sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name END) ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name ,sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_name ,sc_fin_m_bank.account_id ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name )tab
